message:
feat(task-store): validate dependency IDs and reject cycles

- Add validateDependencies helper: rejects self-deps, nonexistent IDs,
  and cycles (DFS white/gray/black coloring via hasCycle)
- Rewrite Append to build tasks first, validate all, then commit;
  restores nextID on failure to prevent ID gaps
- Wire validateDependencies into Update when DependsOn is set
- Tests: nonexistent dep in Append/Update, direct cycle, transitive
  cycle, self-dep, intra-batch cycle, nextID restoration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
